series_metadata.series_title: Pass-Through Entity and Trust Withholding Tax Return
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used to report tax due on trust distributions of income relating to real property in Ohio and tangible personal property in Ohio and pass-through entity distributive shares of income.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from due date or date filed, whichever is later ; Electronic: from due date or date filed, whichever is later
